sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Terminology 1:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Terminology 1:1
items.html: The level of light that comes out on a screen of coarseness of phase one is called “a thin and weak light,” since it does not draw anything from the phase of GAR. (Item 29, and Inner Light there)
